# technitium_dhcp_scope (Data Source)

Reads a Technitium DHCP scope configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dhcp_scope" "lan" {
  name = "lan"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the DHCP scope.

### Read-Only

- `allow_only_reserved_leases` (Boolean) Whether only reserved leases are served.
- `dns_servers` (List of String) DNS servers (option 6).
- `domain_name` (String) Domain name (option 15).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the scope is enabled.
- `ending_address` (String) Ending IP address of the range.
- `exclusions` (Attributes List) Excluded address ranges. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--exclusions))
- `lease_time_days` (Number) Lease time, days component.
- `lease_time_hours` (Number) Lease time, hours component.
- `lease_time_minutes` (Number) Lease time, minutes component.
- `ntp_servers` (List of String) NTP servers (option 42).
- `reserved_leases` (Attributes List) MAC-to-IP reservations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--reserved_leases))
- `router_address` (String) Default gateway (option 3).
- `starting_address` (String) Starting IP address of the range.
- `subnet_mask` (String) Subnet mask.
- `use_this_dns_server` (Boolean) Whether clients are pointed at this DNS server.

<a id="nestedatt--exclusions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `exclusions`

Read-Only:

- `ending_address` (String)
- `starting_address` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--reserved_leases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `reserved_leases`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String)
- `comments` (String)
- `hardware_address` (String)
- `host_name` (String)
